vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only involves editing the Chrony configuration file to retain server directives and removing other time source directives. This change does not affect authentication, bootloader, or critical filesystem layout, and a service restart is sufficient. The risk of losing remote access is minimal.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of time synchronization if misconfigured; Service restart may temporarily interrupt time service
